questions.question: Describe the main differences between a distributed ledger and a blockchain. Explain how blockchain technology builds upon these differences.
What is the primary goal of the Byzantine Generals problem in the context of distributed systems and blockchain? Explain how this problem relates to the CAP theorem.
questions.hint: Focus on key concepts and theoretical foundations

questions.question: What were the key factors that led to the creation of the first blockchain, Bitcoin, and how has it evolved since its inception?
questions.hint: Provide historical context and key technical milestones
